modules.name: GAS_Server
modules.purpose: Google Apps Script server layer. Exposes the SPA via doGet/doPost, routes all RPC calls from the frontend (google.script.run) through API_Universal_Router, and delegates persistence to Engine_DB.

modules.name: DB_Layer
modules.purpose: Agnostic persistence facade (Adapter Pattern). Engine_DB routes CRUD + nested saves to Adapter_Sheets (Google Sheets ORM) and optionally to Adapter_CloudDB. Implements Cache-Aside (CacheService) and silent Audit Trail injection.

modules.name: Data_Schemas
modules.purpose: Single Source of Truth for all entity models. The 'APP_SCHEMAS' constant object defines fields, types, validators, lookupSources, triggers, and calcParams for both the backend (Engine_DB) and the frontend (FormEngine). This is the metadata brain of the entire system.

modules.name: UI_Shell
modules.purpose: Application bootstrap and router. Index.html is the entry shell. JS_Core.html provides AuthManager (GAS identity verification), ThemeManager (multi-theme engine), navigateTo() SPA router, and the Sidebar 3-state controller. CSS_DesignSystem.html and CSS_App.html provide the full design token system.

modules.name: DataView_Engine
modules.purpose: Dynamic table renderer. DataView_UI.html provides the zero-latency, in-memory data grid driven from window.__APP_CACHE__. Supports sorting, search, pagination, and wires up create/edit/delete actions to the FormEngine.

modules.name: Form_Engine
modules.purpose: Metadata-driven, reactive form generator. FormEngine_UI.html reads APP_SCHEMAS to build multi-step wizard forms with Ionic Web Components. Implements the generic Adjacency List hierarchy engine (getGenericOrdenPath, getGenericPathName), S4.3 Debounce listeners, and 0ms modal pre-hydration for edit mode.

modules.name: Dashboard_UI
modules.purpose: Executive summary and portfolio overview. Dashboard_UI.html renders ApexCharts-based KPIs and metric cards mined from window.__APP_CACHE__ data at near-zero latency.

modules.name: DesignKit_UI
modules.purpose: Living Design System showcase. Renders all UI tokens, colors, typography and components for visual validation by developers and designers.

modules.name: Test_Suite
modules.purpose: GAS-side test helpers and unit test coverage for hierarchy math and persistence logic.
